case_title: STANLEY TULCHIN ASSOCIATES WESTERN INC., A CORPORA VS. HUB EXPRESS FREIGHT, INC., A CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STANLEY TULCHIN ASSOCIATES WESTERN INC., A CORPORA TION AS TO DEFENDANT HUB EXPRESS FREIGHT, INC., A CORPORATION DOES 1-50, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-24-2006 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-27-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-09-2006

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-05-2006 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-24-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-05-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED HEREIN AS DOE 2 TO BE JOHNSON, JR., NATHANIEL
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
